description:
Browser where your favorite apps won't get buried in tabs.


🍪 Biscuit Release Note

⚡️New features
- Added support for reopening recently closed tabs from the menu and shortcut flow.
- Added a memory diagnostics dialog with new menu access to help inspect app and tab memory usage.

💪🏻Improvements
- Reduced background webview memory usage for a lighter multitasking experience.
- Improved dark mode support across dialogs and scrollbars for a more consistent appearance.
- Refined sidebar tab text alignment and standardized the UI font stack with a sans-serif default.

🐞Bug
- Fixed an issue where webviews could reload unnecessarily when their URLs changed.
